member.name: F:GTA.LeaveVehicleFlags.WarpIfShuffleLinkIsBlocked
member.summary:
Allow ped to warp if the direct door is blocked and the shuffle link to that seat is blocked by someone. The player
will warp out of the vehicle without any flags if the entry is blocked. Unlike
, this flag allows the the
to warp when the direct door and the shuffle link to that seat is blocked by someone (regardless of whether the door linked to the shuffle link is directly blocked).
